title: Prediction markets defy crypto downturn with record Q2 volume: CoinGecko

title: MoonPay buys Glide to bolster crypto deposits infrastructure
summary: MoonPay acquired Glide, a crypto infrastructure startup founded by former Robinhood Wallet engineers, to expand cross-chain crypto deposit infrastructure.

title: Abbott Boosts 2026 Profit Guidance as Sales Across Firm Rise
summary: Abbott Laboratories raised its 2026 profit guidance after a stronger-than-expected second quarter driven by improved performance across most of its business lines.

title: Stocks Fall on AI Trade Jitters as Brent Tops $85: Markets Wrap
summary: A selloff in chipmakers dragged down stocks on concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will justify lofty valuations, with the market also falling as higher oil prices lifted bond yields.
